name: Biohaven Ltd.
business: Biohaven Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of life-changing treatments in key therapeutic areas, including immunology, neuroscience, and oncology. The company is advancing its portfolio of therapeutics leveraging proprietary drug development platforms, including Kv7 ion channel modulation for epilepsy, Molecular Degrader of Extracellular Proteins (MoDE) for immunological diseases, and a myostatin-activin pathway targeting agent for neuromuscular and metabolic diseases including obesity. Biohaven has not yet generated any product revenue and its product candidates are in clinical development.
sellsTo: patients with neuromuscular and metabolic diseases

exposures.sentence: Biohaven is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of life-changing treatments in key therapeutic areas, including immunology, neuroscience, and oncology.

catalysts.event: Pivotal trial initiation for BHV-1300 in Graves disease
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a pivotal trial in 2026.

catalysts.event: Pivotal study initiation for BHV-1400 in IgA nephropathy
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate the pivotal study in IgAN patients in 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results for RISE 3 (opakalim in focal epilepsy)
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline results from RISE 3 in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results for Phase 2 obesity study of taldefgrobep alfa
catalysts.sentence: Biohaven initiated a Phase 2 study of taldefgrobep in the management of obesity in the fourth quarter of 2025 and expects to report topline results in 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA appeal meeting for troriluzole in SCA
catalysts.sentence: Following receipt of the CRL, we have requested a Type A meeting with the FDA to initiate an appeal process.

tamClaims.claim: Graves' Disease is estimated to impact 1% of the population globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Graves' Disease is estimated to impact 1% of the population globally.

tamClaims.claim: RA is a chronic autoimmune disease estimated to affect 1 to 2% of the global population.
tamClaims.sentence: RA is a chronic autoimmune disease estimated to affect 1 to 2% of the global population.

tamClaims.claim: Epilepsy affects approximately 3.5 million Americans, or more than 1.2% of adults and 0.6% of children in the U.S., and more than 50 million patients worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Epilepsy affects approximately 3.5 million Americans, or more than 1.2% of adults and 0.6% of children in the U.S., and more than 50 million patients worldwide, according to the World Health Organization (WHO).

tamClaims.claim: SCA affects approximately 15,000 people in the United States and 24,000 in Europe and the United Kingdom.
tamClaims.sentence: SCA affects approximately 15,000 people in the United States and 24,000 in Europe and the United Kingdom.

tamClaims.claim: By 2030, it is expected that nearly one billion people will be living with obesity, including 50% of the adult and 25% of the adolescent U.S. population.
tamClaims.sentence: By 2030, it is expected that nearly one billion people will be living with obesity, including 50% of the adult and 25% of the adolescent U.S. population.
